notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
CP00-127 is synthetic-only, metadata-only, and Risk A scoped to failure taxonomy permission/audit test evidence and synthetic fixture opening references.
Failure unit test and integration smoke rows are deterministic references and do not persist state.
Audit failure hints and Hermes failure evidence remain preview/reference-only and do not write audit ledgers or Hermes runtime.
Claude edge-case prompt rows are read-only references and do not execute Claude review.
Human escalation rows do not grant approval and remain reference-only.
Synthetic fixture opening rows fail closed for missing tenant, actor, and Matter without real data or persistence.

No runtime UI/API route, permission policy mutation, product/database write, idempotency persistence, lock acquisition, retry, rollback, compensation, external share/export, AI/analytics execution, LDIP implementation, or HRX split was added.
Unrelated dirty/untracked files were preserved and not included in the active pack.
